story.soThat: I can easily see which coins can be analyzed

subtasks.subtask: Create CSS classes cho coin highlight
Use subtle border hoặc background color
Ensure highlight is visible but not intrusive
Test highlight visibility on various backgrounds
Add highlight styles to content script CSS
Add highlight class to detected coin elements
Apply highlight khi coin is detected
Store highlight state để track highlighted elements
Handle multiple highlights on same page
Test highlight appears correctly
Add click handler to remove highlight
Remove highlight class khi button is clicked
Optional: keep highlight for better UX
Test highlight removal works
Test highlight persists if option disabled
Use subtle colors (low opacity)
Use thin borders instead of thick
Avoid changing element dimensions
Test highlight doesn't break page layout
Test highlight doesn't interfere với page interactions
Detect dark mode (prefers-color-scheme media query)
Use appropriate colors for dark mode
Test highlight visibility on dark backgrounds
Test highlight works on dark mode pages
Ensure contrast is sufficient

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Detected coins have visual highlight (subtle border hoặc background)
Highlight appears khi coin is detected
Highlight removed khi button is clicked (optional)
Highlight styling không interfere với page design
Highlight works với dark mode pages

doc.title: Story 11.3: Analysis Button Injection
doc.snippet: Button injection implemented. Can apply highlight to same elements that get buttons. Can combine highlight với button injection.

file.reason: Can combine highlight với button injection. Apply highlight to same elements that get buttons.

constraint.description: Use subtle colors (low opacity), thin borders, avoid changing element dimensions. Ensure highlight is visible but not intrusive.
Detect dark mode using prefers-color-scheme media query. Use appropriate colors for dark backgrounds. Ensure sufficient contrast.

tests.standards: Testing standards: Test highlight appears on detected coins, test highlight styling is subtle và non-intrusive, test highlight removal on button click, test highlight doesn't break page layout, test highlight works với dark mode. Use Chrome DevTools để verify highlight styling.

ideas.test: Test highlight appears on detected coins với subtle styling
Test highlight appears khi coin is detected
Test highlight removal on button click (if implemented)
Test highlight doesn't break page layout
Test highlight works với dark mode pages
